banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MARCH 2)
banner.subtitle: Official Notice Inside — 7 Gulf Countries Affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. New dates to be announced after review on March 3.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

madad.note: Register your grievance and track status online

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.crisisNote: 81+ flights cancelled (31 Gulf, 50 Europe/US). Gulf + Europe routes suspended (London, Birmingham, Amsterdam, Zurich, Milan, Vienna, Copenhagen, Frankfurt). Free rebooking or full refund for bookings before Feb 28, travel until March 5.

airlines.name: IndiGo
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Gulf suspended until March 2 (23:59 IST).

airlines.name: Air India Express
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Gulf suspended until March 2 (23:59 IST).

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.crisisNote: All operations to/from Dubai suspended until March 3, 15:00 UAE time. Rebook until March 20 or request refund.

airlines.name: Etihad
airlines.crisisNote: All operations suspended until March 2, 14:00 UAE time (2 PM). Rebook free until March 15 for bookings made before Feb 28.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Operations suspended due to Qatari airspace closure. Next update expected March 3 by 09:00 Doha time.

airlines.name: Akasa Air
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to Abu Dhabi, Doha, Jeddah, Kuwait, Riyadh suspended until March 2.

additionalAirlines.note: Not all carriers publish clear suspension notices. Always verify with the airline directly.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This hub aggregates public information for urgent reference. Always confirm directly with airlines, airports, and official government sources. We do not provide legal advice or guarantee service availability.

advisories.title: Dubai Airports: DXB/DWC operations suspended until further notice
advisories.summary: Dubai Airports says all flight operations at DXB and DWC are suspended until further notice; passengers should not travel to the airport and must contact their airline for updates.

advisories.title: CBSE Board Exams postponed (March 2) — Middle East
advisories.summary: CBSE postponed Class 10 & 12 exams scheduled for March 2 in 7 Middle East countries. New date will be announced after review on March 3.

advisories.title: Major Gulf airspace closures disrupting flights
advisories.summary: Multiple GCC airspaces are closed or restricted due to escalation. Expect cancellations, diversions, and delays. Check airline flight status before travel.

advisories.title: MEA 24x7 Situation Room active
advisories.summary: MEA has activated a 24x7 Situation Room for assistance. Use helplines or email if you are impacted.

advisories.title: Embassy of India in Doha operating emergency-only
advisories.summary: Embassy of India in Doha is operating in emergency-only mode. Regular consular services are temporarily closed.

advisories.title: Kerala NORKA helpdesk for Gulf expatriates
advisories.summary: Kerala's NORKA has opened a helpdesk for expatriates affected by flight disruptions.

advisories.title: FRRO contact for visa extensions (foreign nationals in India)
advisories.summary: MEA advisory: foreign nationals in India who cannot leave due to flight disruptions should contact FRRO for visa-related support.
